text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring G1 races for the senior year are just
around the corner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then, one evening...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hmm, so what should I be going after...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What do I wanna do? What kind of person do I
want to be?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There's gotta be something else I want... but I
can't figure it out. Why is that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I was just figuring out my goals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
For this year, or rather, this year and
beyond—what I'm running for.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I thought I should finally figure out an answer to
that. I do have an idea of what direction I want to
go in, at least.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna use my shredded physique to become the
kind of racer who can surpass McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Which is good and all, and I should be working
solely toward that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She still has a frown on her face. It seems like
there's more on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Well! I guess that should be enough, right?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: If I work hard and beat McQueen, then I should be pumped in body and mind! So I guess that's what I'll do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...You think I'm foolin'?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: How... How'd you know that? Geez...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks at me like I just rubbed salt onto a
wound. Maybe there's something Mejiro Ryan
longs for even more, deep inside herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask her why she's always admired McQueen so
much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You know... It's McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She's always beautiful... No matter the time or
place, she's so elegant and dignified...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Her presence alone can change the whole mood
of a place, make it into an entirely different
world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And... she's always surrounded by people who
love her—even outside the family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And I... I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I wanted to be like her... I wanted to be a star!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh!
choice_data_list: Looks like you found your answer.
Looks like you found your answer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Me, a star? Like Oguri and McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: There's no way... Not me! I could never be!
choice_data_list: But that's what you want to become, right?
But that's what you want to become, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I really do. I want to be like them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's frustrating and embarrassing to admit it, but I
do... I wanna be a racing star.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But... I have no idea of how I can do it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spilling her guts, Ryan calms down a little.
We continue our conversation as we walk.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What do you think "star quality" is exactly?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen has her elegance, Oguri's races are
always full of excitement...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's not just their looks, and it's not just their
speed either. What is it, exactly?
choice_data_list: I don't really know to tell the truth.
I don't really know to tell the truth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Aw man, really? I thought you might have some idea.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But... maybe that's just the way it is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We all have that certain something that just can't
be gained by working hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I might be asking for too much... but it's good to
finally know what I really want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives me a sad smile, her fragile heart now
burdened with a difficult question.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know that I can be childish to an almost pathetic
degree, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I need your help, so keep stickin' with me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's her senior year now. Although she's grown
more competitive, Ryan is still a child at heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cruel spring season waits for no one,
however. She has no choice but to embrace that
fragility and keep running.
